legal_header_intro_p1: Projekt City is a private, independent project provided to you completely free of charge as part of itsmarian.dev. By downloading, you receive a compressed ZIP file which you can unzip and load directly into Minecraft - at your own risk.
legal_header_intro_p2: Please note that Projekt City is managed by itsmarian.dev. The legally required Imprint (Legal Notice) and central contact information can be found at ${imprint_link}.
legal_header_intro_p3: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to our ${at}, ${eula_link}, ${privacy_link}, ${terms_link}, and ${world_link}. If you do not agree, please leave our website and refrain from using our services.
s1_1: The following terms and conditions apply to the use of the websites "projektcity.github.io" & "projektcity.com" and its subpages (hereinafter "Website"). In order to use the Website, it is important that you as a user accept the following terms and conditions.
s1_2: By using our Website, you agree to the terms of use of our Website. By agreeing, you warrant to us that you will not make any contributions that violate the Terms of Use.
s1_3_intro: The subject matter of Projekt City is as follows:
s2_p: If you have any questions regarding our website, you can contact us using the following contact details:
s3_1: Projekt City has an availability of 24 hours a day. However, there may be interruptions in availability due to maintenance required for the system. Interruptions in availability may occur, among other things, due to force majeure or other causes for which Projekt City is not responsible, such as intent or gross negligence.
s3_2_li1: that errors may lead to the temporary shutdown of the Website,
s3_2_li2: that it is technically impossible to make the Website available free of errors of any kind and that Projekt City therefore accepts no responsibility for this,
s3_2_li3: that the availability of this website is dependent on conditions and services beyond the control of Projekt City, such as transmission capacities and telephone connections between the individual parties. We are not responsible for disruptions in this area.
s4_p: If Projekt City offers temporary or permanent discussion forums on its websites, participants in the discussion forums are expected to observe the usual rules of communication, such as mutual respect. Visitors may not disseminate or publish any insulting, possibly derogatory, foul, offensive, defamatory or obscene material or material that infringes the intellectual property rights of third parties.
s5_p: When you use a Projekt City Service or send e-mails, text messages or other communications to us from your computer or mobile device, you are communicating with us electronically. We will communicate with you electronically in a variety of ways, including via email, text messages, or by posting electronic messages or other communications on our website or as part of other Projekt City services. For contractual purposes, you agree to receive electronic communications from us and that all consents, notices, disclosures and other communications that we provide to you electronically do not require written form unless mandatory applicable law requires a different form of communication.
s6_1: All Content included in or made available through any Projekt City Service, such as text, graphics, logos, button icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads and data compilations, is the property of Projekt City or third parties who supply Content or make it available on the Website and is protected by German copyright and database right laws.
s6_2: The entire body of Content included in or made available through any Projekt City Service is also the exclusive property of Projekt City and is protected by German copyright and database right laws.
s6_3: You may not systematically extract and/or re-utilize parts of any "projektcity.github.io" & "projektcity.com" Service without our express written consent. In particular, you may not use any data mining, robots, or similar data gathering and extraction tools to extract any substantial parts of any Projekt City Service for re-use without the express written consent of Projekt City Ltd.
s7_p: All patents registered on Projekt City are also applicable to all services and other products of Projekt City. It may happen that the respective patents are operated under one or more patents.
s8_p: Projekt City respects the intellectual property rights of third parties. If you believe that your intellectual property rights have been used in a way that gives rise to a claim of infringement, please follow our procedure for reporting infringement to "itsmarian.wixsite.com/projektcity", "itsmarian.wixsite.com/helpcenter" & "projektcity.github.io".
s9_1: We always endeavor to ensure that the services of Projekt City are available without interruption and that transmissions are error-free. However, due to the nature of the Internet, this cannot be guaranteed. Your access to Projekt City's services may also be interrupted or restricted from time to time to allow for repairs, maintenance or the introduction of new facilities. We will try to limit the frequency and duration of any such temporary interruptions or restrictions.
s9_2: Projekt City shall be liable without limitation insofar as the cause of the damage is based on an intentional or grossly negligent breach of duty by Projekt City or a legal representative or vicarious agent of Projekt City.
s9_3: Furthermore, Projekt City shall be liable for the slightly negligent breach of material obligations. Material obligations are obligations whose breach jeopardizes the achievement of the purpose of the contract or whose fulfillment makes the proper execution of the contract possible in the first place and on whose compliance you regularly rely. In this case, however, Projekt City is only liable for the foreseeable damage typical for the contract. Projekt City is not liable for the slightly negligent breach of obligations other than those mentioned in the preceding sentences.
s9_4: The above limitations of liability shall not apply in the event of injury to life, limb or health, for a defect following the assumption of a guarantee for the quality of the product and in the event of fraudulently concealed defects. Liability under the Product Liability Act remains unaffected.
s9_5: Insofar as the liability of Projekt City is excluded or limited, this also applies to the personal liability of employees, representatives and vicarious agents.
s10_p: Our site/s contain links to third parties. These are provided for convenience and information purposes only. Projekt City assumes no liability and is not responsible for the content of the respective website. Only the operator(s) of the website are responsible for its content and bear responsibility for it! It can happen that links provided by us lead to (meanwhile) no longer accessible or error pages. We always try to keep our links up to date, but the above-mentioned errors can still occur! If you notice this, please contact us so that we can fix it as soon as possible.
s11_1: It is possible that visitor and user data and information (date, time, page accessed) may be stored on the server. We would like to point out that - without consent - no personal data (e.g. name, address or e-mail address) will be stored.
s11_2: If personal data is collected, we undertake to obtain the prior consent of the user of the website. We undertake not to pass on any data to third parties unless the visitor or user gives their prior consent.
s11_3: We would like to point out that the transmission of data on the Internet (e.g. by e-mail) may be subject to security vulnerabilities. Accordingly, error-free and trouble-free protection of third-party data cannot be fully guaranteed. Our liability in this respect is excluded.
s11_4: Third parties are not authorized to use contact data for commercial activities.
s11_5: The user has the right to information. You have the right to receive complete information from us about the data concerning you at any time and free of charge.
s11_6: Furthermore, the user has the right to rectification/deletion of data/restriction of processing.
s11_7: Further information is provided separately in the privacy policy.
s12_1: We may use cookies to display the product range. Cookies are small text files that are stored locally in the cache of the website visitor's Internet browser.
s12_2: Numerous websites and servers use cookies. Many cookies contain a so-called cookie ID. A cookie ID is a unique identifier for the cookie. It consists of a string of characters that can be used to assign websites and servers to the specific internet browser in which the cookie was stored. This enables the websites and servers visited to distinguish the individual browser of the data subject from other Internet browsers that contain other cookies. A specific Internet browser can be recognized and identified via the unique cookie ID.
s12_3: The use of cookies enables us to provide users of this website with more user-friendly services that would not be possible without cookies.
s12_4: We would like to point out that some of these cookies are transferred from our server to your computer system, whereby these are mostly so-called session-related cookies. Session-related cookies are characterized by the fact that they are automatically deleted from your hard drive at the end of the browser session. Other cookies remain on your computer system and enable us to recognize your computer system on your next visit (so-called persistent cookies).
s12_5: You can object to the storage of cookies by clicking on a banner to which you can object/accept.
s12_6: Of course, you can set your browser so that no cookies are stored on your hard disk or cookies that have already been stored are deleted. The instructions regarding the prevention and deletion of cookies can be found in the help function of your browser or software manufacturer.
s13_title: #13 Changes to the terms of use
s13_p: We reserve the right to make changes to Projekt City services, rules and conditions, including these Terms of Use, at any time. You will be subject to the terms and conditions, terms of contract and terms of use in effect at the time you use the services of Projekt City. If any of these Terms are held to be invalid, void or for any reason unenforceable, that provision shall be deemed severable and shall not affect the validity and enforceability of any remaining provisions.
s14_p: If you breach these Terms of Use and we do nothing about it, we will still be entitled to exercise our rights on any other occasion on which you breach these Terms of Use.
s15_1: The contract language is English. If you use a language other than English, you must expect that your request will not be processed.
s15_2: If you breach these Terms of Use and we do nothing about it, we will still be entitled to exercise our rights on any other occasion on which you breach these Terms of Use.
s15_3: We reserve the right to make changes to our Website, rules, terms and conditions, including these Terms of Use, at any time. If any provision of these Terms of Use is held to be invalid, void or for any reason unenforceable, that provision shall be deemed severable and shall not affect the validity and enforceability of any remaining provisions.
s15_4: The invalidity of one provision shall not affect the validity of the other provisions of the contract. Should this occur, the provision shall be replaced by another legally permissible provision that comes as close as possible to the meaning of the invalid provision.
